subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy gaze towards the divine realm! What thou didst write to his honour Siyyid Javad hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بدیار الهی آنچه بجناب سید جواد مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه شد چون مدل
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
